title: cotyledon brachyantha var. ochroleuca
intro: Cotyledon brachyantha var. ochroleuca, also known as the Yellow-Leafed Bear Paw, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cotyledon brachyantha var. ochroleuca include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be harvested and dried to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
